details: Created NestJS project with TypeScript. Source in src/, build output in build/. Added scripts: build, start, start:dev, start:debug. Revert: delete all files and run npm init.

description: Set up Prisma for MySQL with introspective workflow
details: Installed Prisma + dotenv. Moved Prisma schema to database/ dir. Created schema.sql for DDL. Created PrismaService and global DatabaseModule. Added db:push, db:pull, db:generate, db:sync scripts. Revert: delete database/, src/database/, prisma.config.ts, remove prisma/@prisma/client/dotenv from package.json, remove db scripts.
Shell script that parses DATABASE_URL from .env, runs database/schema.sql against MySQL, then runs prisma db pull and prisma generate. Revert: delete db-sync.sh.

description: Moved database files from database/ to src/database/
details: Moved schema.prisma and schema.sql from root database/ into src/database/. Updated prisma.config.ts schema path to src/database/schema.prisma. Updated db-sync.sh and package.json db:push script to reference src/database/schema.sql. Fixed schema.prisma output path to ../generated/prisma. Revert: move files back to database/ and restore old paths in prisma.config.ts, db-sync.sh, package.json.

Created tables: user, harvest_category, harvest, harvest_image, chat_room, message. Includes all PKs, unique constraints (user.email), FKs, ENUM for user.type, and self-referencing FK on message.reply_to_id. Revert: replace schema.sql content with the original comment-only template.

description: Switch to prisma-client-js for node_modules output
details: Changed generator provider from prisma-client to prisma-client-js so client generates into node_modules/@prisma/client. Updated import to @prisma/client. Removed src/database/generated from .gitignore. Revert: change provider back to prisma-client with explicit output path.

Installed @nestjs/jwt, @nestjs/passport, passport-jwt, @nestjs/config, and @types/passport-jwt for authToken.service.ts. Revert: npm uninstall @nestjs/jwt @nestjs/passport passport-jwt @nestjs/config @types/passport-jwt.

Removed EncryptionService dependency. JWT payload now stores userId directly as 'sub' claim instead of encrypting it. Changed userId type from bigint to number. Removed unused DataInJwt type from general.d.ts. Revert: restore EncryptionService imports/usage, re-add DataInJwt type, change userId back to bigint with encrypt/decrypt calls.

5 endpoints: POST /auth/signup (farmer/wholesaler only), POST /auth/login (normal users), POST /auth/admin/login (admin only), POST /auth/reset-password (request token), POST /auth/reset-password/confirm (set new password). Fixed BcryptService to use config rounds. Added ConfigModule.forRoot globally. Added ValidationPipe with whitelist. Installed class-validator + class-transformer. Reset tokens stored in-memory (swap to Redis/DB later). Revert: empty auth.controller.ts/auth.service.ts/auth.module.ts, delete dtos/, restore old bcrypt.service.ts/app.module.ts/main.ts, npm uninstall class-validator class-transformer.

Created JwtAuthGuard (extends AuthGuard jwt), RolesGuard (checks user.type against @Roles metadata), @CurrentUser() param decorator, @Roles() metadata decorator, multer config (disk storage, image filter, 5MB limit). Revert: delete src/common/ directory.

description: Extended DB schema with new tables and columns
details: Added phone/location/bio/farm_name/business_name/is_active/timestamps to user table. Added description/location/is_available/timestamps to harvest. Added timestamps to chat_room/message. Created order table (buyer_id/harvest_id/quantity/prices/status enum/note/timestamps). Created payment table (order_id/amount/method enum/status enum/transaction_ref). Created review table (reviewer_id/reviewee_id/order_id/rating CHECK 1-5/comment/unique constraint). Revert: restore original schema.sql, revert schema.prisma, run db:sync.

6 endpoints: GET/PATCH /account/profile, PATCH /account/profile/photo (multer upload), GET /account/profile/:id (public), PATCH /account/deactivate, PATCH /account/change-password. Revert: delete src/features/account/, remove AccountModule from app.module.ts.

9 endpoints: POST /harvests (farmer), GET /harvests/mine, GET /harvests/:id, PATCH /harvests/:id (owner), DELETE /harvests/:id (owner), POST /harvests/:id/images (up to 5), DELETE /harvests/:id/images/:imageId, POST /harvests/categories (admin), GET /harvests/categories (public). Revert: delete src/features/harvest/, remove HarvestModule from app.module.ts.

3 endpoints: GET /marketplace (search/filter/sort/paginate by category/location/price/quantity), GET /marketplace/trending (most ordered), GET /marketplace/:id (detail + farmer profile + rating). Revert: delete src/features/marketplace/, remove MarketplaceModule from app.module.ts.

8 endpoints: POST /orders (wholesaler places order), GET /orders (role-aware list), GET /orders/history, GET /orders/:id, PATCH /orders/:id/accept (farmer deducts quantity), PATCH /orders/:id/reject, PATCH /orders/:id/complete, PATCH /orders/:id/cancel (buyer, pending only). Status transitions enforced. Revert: delete src/features/order/, remove OrderModule from app.module.ts.

5 endpoints: POST /payments (initiate, generates UUID transaction_ref), GET /payments (history), GET /payments/:id, POST /payments/:id/confirm (admin), POST /payments/:id/refund (admin). Simulated - no real gateway. Revert: delete src/features/payment/, remove PaymentModule from app.module.ts.

4 endpoints: POST /reviews (completed orders only, auto-determines reviewee), GET /reviews/my-reviews, GET /reviews/user/:userId (with avg rating), GET /reviews/order/:orderId. One review per reviewer per order. Revert: delete src/features/review/, remove ReviewModule from app.module.ts.

REST: GET /chat/rooms, POST /chat/rooms, GET /chat/rooms/:id/messages. WebSocket (/chat namespace): authenticate, send_message, mark_read, typing events. Server emits: new_message, message_delivered, message_read, user_typing. Installed @nestjs/websockets, @nestjs/platform-socket.io, socket.io. Revert: delete src/features/chat/, remove ChatModule from app.module.ts, npm uninstall websocket packages.

WebSocket gateway on /calls namespace. Events: authenticate, call_initiate, call_accept, call_reject, call_end, webrtc_offer, webrtc_answer, webrtc_ice_candidate. Pure signaling relay, no media server. Tracks active calls in memory. Revert: delete src/features/call/, remove CallModule from app.module.ts.

4 endpoints: GET /analytics/sales (farmer revenue/orders by category), GET /analytics/demand (top ordered harvests), GET /analytics/popular (top 10 products by order count), GET /analytics/platform (admin: user/harvest/order/revenue totals). All read-only aggregation queries. Revert: delete src/features/analytics/, remove AnalyticsModule from app.module.ts.

7 endpoints: GET /admin/users (paginated/filterable), PATCH /admin/users/:id/verify, PATCH /admin/users/:id/deactivate, GET /admin/harvests (paginated), DELETE /admin/harvests/:id, GET /admin/orders (paginated/filterable by status), PATCH /admin/orders/:id/resolve. All admin-only. Revert: delete src/features/admin/, remove AdminModule from app.module.ts.

description: Prisma client output changed to src/generated/prisma
details: Changed Prisma generator output from node_modules/@prisma/client to src/generated/prisma due to root-owned node_modules/.prisma permissions. Updated all imports across codebase. Added src/generated to .gitignore. Revert: change output back to default in schema.prisma, update all imports back to @prisma/client, run npx prisma generate.

description: Bug audit and unit test suite
details: Created BUGS.md documenting 21 bugs (7 critical, 8 high, 6 medium) found via code review. Created BUG-FIXES.md with step-by-step fix instructions for each bug. Set up Jest testing infrastructure (jest.config.ts, @nestjs/testing, ts-jest). Wrote 176 unit tests across 13 test suites covering all services (auth, account, harvest, order, payment, review, chat, marketplace, analytics, admin) and utilities (bcrypt, authToken, roles guard). Tests include bug-documenting tests for BUG-08 and BUG-16. Revert: delete BUGS.md, BUG-FIXES.md, jest.config.ts, all *.spec.ts files, npm uninstall jest ts-jest @types/jest @nestjs/testing, remove test scripts from package.json.

description: Remove .js extensions from all relative imports
details: Removed .js extensions from 93 relative import paths across 32 files. The project uses CommonJS with ts-node so .js extensions caused MODULE_NOT_FOUND errors at runtime. Changed patterns like from '../../database/prisma.service.js' to from '../../database/prisma.service'. Only relative imports were modified; node_modules imports were left untouched. Revert: add .js back to all relative import paths (find with grep for relative imports without .js extension).
